What Our Clients Say.

★★★★★
Google Rating  ·  Updated Weekly
★★★★★
Google
"Brought my truck in for paint correction and I genuinely could not believe the results. Swirls and scratches I'd had for years were completely gone. Worth every penny."
JM
James M.
North Atlanta, GA
★★★★★
Google
"The ceramic coating they put on my car has been incredible — water just beads right off and it still looks freshly waxed months later. Highly recommend."
SR
Sarah R.
Alpharetta, GA
★★★★★
Google
"Best detailing experience I've had. They treated my car like it was their own and the interior came out spotless. Already booked my next appointment."
DK
David K.
Cumming, GA
★★★★★
Google
"Showed up on time, professional, and the results were immaculate. My car hasn't looked this clean since I drove it off the lot. The full detail package is absolutely worth it."
MP
Marcus P.
Johns Creek, GA
★★★★★
Google
"I've tried a few mobile detailers and Rover Detail is in a different league. The attention to detail on the exterior was insane — every inch. Already on a bi-weekly plan now."
TL
Tyler L.
Roswell, GA
★★★★★
Google
"My leather seats look brand new. They got out stains I thought were permanent and the whole cabin smelled incredible when they were done. Incredible service."

Milton, GA
